summary: Bug fix verification for golfinmallorca.com - Both reported bugs are FIXED. (1) Admin Content Manager URL parsing fix verified in code (try-catch wrapper at line 280). (2) Footer cropping issue NOT reproducible - all internal pages show full footer (673px height). All 7 pages tested show footer correctly.

content_manager_fix.details: ContentManager.jsx line 280: new URL(bookingUrl).hostname wrapped in try-catch to prevent React crash from invalid URLs

critical_code_review_comments: ContentManager.jsx fix is correctly implemented: try-catch wrapper around new URL(bookingUrl).hostname at line 280
Fix gracefully falls back to displaying raw bookingUrl if URL parsing fails
Footer component uses proper data-testid='footer' for testing
All internal pages (terms, privacy, golf-holidays, book-tee-times, blog posts, golf course details) render footer correctly
Navigation smooth scrolling works correctly for all sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verification complete for iteration 25. Two bugs were reported: (1) Admin Content Manager blank page - FIXED via try-catch wrapper around URL parsing in ContentManager.jsx line 280. (2) Footer cropping on internal pages - NOT REPRODUCIBLE, all 7 tested pages show footer with full 673px height. Admin dashboard requires Emergent Auth and cannot be tested via Playwright. Key data-testids: footer, hero-section, terms-page, privacy-page, blog-post-page. Console shows 401 errors for /api/auth/me and /api/reviews/pending which is expected for unauthenticated users.

content_manager_blank_page.root_cause: new URL(bookingUrl).hostname crashed when partner had invalid URL
content_manager_blank_page.fix_description: Wrapped URL parsing in try-catch to gracefully fallback to raw URL

footer_cropping.details: All 7 tested pages show footer with full 673px height, no cropping observed
